Body.Content:
View and monitor Loop usage in the tenant through existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 421611.

When this will happen:

General Availability (Worldwide): We will begin rolling out mid-March 2025 and expect to complete by late March 2025.

How this will affect your organization:

Once available, administrators can view and monitor Loop usage in the tenant through the existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards.

What you need to do to prepare:

There is nothing you need to do to prepare. These changes will roll to your tenant automatically.

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Microsoft Loop Admin Usage Reports will be available in existing Microsoft 365 admin dashboards for monitoring Loop usage, starting mid-March 2025 and completing by late March 2025. No preparation is needed as the update will be automatic. This is related to Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 421611.

Body.Content:
Updated March 4, 2025: We have updated the rollout timeline below. Thank you for your patience.

View and monitor Loop usage in the tenant through existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 421611.

When this will happen:

General Availability (Worldwide): We will begin rolling out mid-June 2025 (previously mid-March) and expect to complete by late June 2025 (previously late March).

How this will affect your organization:

Once available, administrators can view and monitor Loop usage in the tenant through the existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards.

What you need to do to prepare:

There is nothing you need to do to prepare. These changes will roll to your tenant automatically.

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Microsoft Loop admin usage reports will be available in mid-June 2025, allowing administrators to monitor Loop usage through existing Microsoft 365 admin dashboards. The rollout will complete by late June 2025. No preparation is needed as changes will be automatic.

Body.Content:

When this will happen:

General Availability (Worldwide): We will begin rolling out mid-September 2025 (previously mid-June) and expect to complete by late October 2025 (previously late June).

What you need to do to prepare:

Body.Content:
Updated August 15, 2025: After further review we have decided not to proceed with this change at this time. We apologize for any inconvenience.

View and monitor Loop usage in the tenant through existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 421611.

When this will happen:

General Availability (Worldwide): We will communicate via Message center when we are ready to proceed. 

How this will affect your organization:

Once available, administrators can view and monitor Loop usage in the tenant through the existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards.

What you need to do to prepare:

There is nothing you need to do to prepare. These changes will roll to your tenant automatically.

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Microsoft has decided not to proceed with the planned update for Microsoft Loop admin usage reports. Loop usage can still be monitored through existing Microsoft 365 admin usage dashboards. No action is needed from administrators, and updates will be communicated via Message center when ready.

Body.Content:
Updated August 20, 2025: After further review, this has been delayed. A new Message Center post will be published closer to the updated release date. It will still correspond to the existing Roadmap ID 421611.  We apologize for any inconvenience.
